channel.title: NAC Diegritz, J Manhart, K Bücher, B Grabein, G Schuierer, J Kühnisch, KH Kunzelmann, R Hickel, C Fotiadou | PlatCOVID

image.title: NAC Diegritz, J Manhart, K Bücher, B Grabein, G Schuierer, J Kühnisch, KH Kunzelmann, R Hickel, C Fotiadou

item.title: A detailed report on the measures taken in the Department of Conservative Dentistry and Periodontology in Munich at the beginning of the COVID-19 outbreak.
